zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Ruggles於1676年8月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利時，他的父親John Ruggles Jr42歲，母親Sarah Dyer27歲。他於1696年11月19日與Mercy Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1676年住在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。他去世於1708年9月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德享年32歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德素費爾德笛卡爾 特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Ruggles于1676年8月11日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利时，他的父亲John Ruggles Jr42岁，母亲Sarah Dyer27岁。他于1696年11月19日与Mercy Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1676年住在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。他去世于1708年9月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德享年32岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德素費爾德笛卡爾 特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Ruggles was born on 11 August 1676, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, John Ruggles Jr, was 42 and his mother, Sarah Dyer, was 27. He married Mercy Woodbridge on 19 November 1696, in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States in 1676. He died on 5 September 1708, in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 32, and was buried in Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Ruggles est né le 11 août 1676, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Ruggles Jr, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sarah Dyer, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mercy Woodbridge le 19 novembre 1696, à Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1676. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1708, à Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Benjamin Ruggles am 11. August 1676 in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ruggles Jr 42 und seine Mutter Sarah Dyer 27. Er hat am 19. November 1696 in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Mercy Woodbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1676 hat er in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 5. September 1708 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Ruggles è nato il il 11 agosto 1676 nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, John Ruggles Jr, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Dyer, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mercy Woodbridge il 19 novembre 1696, nel Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1676. Morì il 5 settembre 1708, nel Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Benjamin Rugglesが1676年8月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで生まれた時，父John Ruggles Jrは42歳，母Sarah Dyerは27歳であった。1696年11月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドでMercy Woodbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼は1708年9月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドで32歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードスフィールドオルド センター セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Ruggles(이)가 1676년 8월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ruggles Jr(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Dyer(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1696년 11월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드에서 Mercy Woodbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1676년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 살았다. 그는 1708년 9월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 수필드 드 세터 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Ruggles nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1676, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Ruggles Jr, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Dyer, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mercy Woodbridge em 19 de novembro de 1696, em Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1676. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1708, em Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Ruggles родился 11 августа 1676 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени John Ruggles Jr было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Dyer, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mercy Woodbridge 19 ноября 1696 г. в местности суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1676 году. Он умер 5 сентября 1708 г. в местности суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности олд кентир кеметири, суффиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin Ruggles nació el 11 de agosto de 1676, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Ruggles Jr, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Sarah Dyer, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mercy Woodbridge el 19 de noviembre de 1696, en Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1676. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1708, en Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Old Center Cemetery, Suffield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
